title: Tala Stainless Steel Mini Sink Strainer (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Suitable for sinks, basins and baths
description: From the manufacturer Sink Strainers In our homes, Sink Strainers are used as drain covers in sinks, showers and bathtubs. Without using a Sink Strainer, deposits and other stray items in the line can cause blockages within the drainage system . Due to the velocity of the water pushing them, they can severely damage or clog devices installed in the flow stream of the water line. A strainer is essentially a screen installed to allow water to pass through, but not larger items. The larger items fall to the bottom or are held in a basket for later clean out. Strainers come in several different styles based on the needs. Our plate style strainers is the simplest, in which water flows through a perforated plate. Often the plate is corrugated shape to increase surface area. The Chef Aid set of two plastic Sink Strainers are ideal for all sinks are the home and designed for collecting all types of debries that would collect in sinks around the home. This Chef Aid Mini Sink Strainer will fit most sinks and is made from Stainless Steel to prevent rusting. It is designed to be used in the Kitchen and Utility room but will also work well in all other sinks around the home or work place. The large Chef Aid Sink Strainer is the most universal Sink Strainer in the market and design to fit all Sinks, It is made from aluminuim which makes it flexible and very durable. The Tala Sink Strainer is made from top quality rust resistant Stainless Steel and has an ultra fine Mesh that will filter out all debris, This product has been designed to look good in any traditional or contemporary designed Kitchen Sink but is also suitable for use around all the home.
